path_exhaustion_table.objective: reduce weak-source debt and improve Adobe episode yield safely
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: No safe parser or episode-builder fix was identified without risking false positives or broader segmentation regressions.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if new source-specific parser evidence shows a bounded Adobe episode split rule with regression coverage.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: recover more Google Developer Forums valid rows without admitting support noise
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: No safe valid-filter expansion was found; likely gains were too support-heavy.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a source-native false-negative pattern is isolated with low noise and strong regression tests.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: remove weak-source debt and improve workbook readiness
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Deleting weak sources, especially Domo, reduced breadth and regressed source-balance metrics.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a replacement source is already proven and balance-neutral or better.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: add a new automated representative source family
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Automated collection path was not viable enough to justify bounded implementation.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a new clearly public and stable automated access path is discovered.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: add a new HTML-only representative source family
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Public listing discovery failed and yielded zero usable rows.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if stable public listing access is verified with a new public path.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: expand with a narrow Reddit operator-language bundle
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Yield was noisy and low-signal; valid and labelable ratios were too weak.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a materially different Reddit slice with demonstrated non-chatter retention is identified.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: add a high-yield GitHub Discussions supporting source family
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Access was stable but developer/support noise dominated.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a materially different repo surface with proven user-pain concentration is found.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: salvage GitHub Discussions by dropping noisy repos
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Quality got worse, not better, after narrowing.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: test the best remaining GitHub Discussions repo in isolation
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Single-repo isolation improved ratio but still left low volume, high support noise, and weak persona-core fit.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a new Lightdash public discussion surface appears.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: add non-PowerBI Stack Overflow reporting evidence
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Existing Stack Overflow already contains meaningful SSRS coverage; the issue is exposure, not absence.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if the existing SSRS slice becomes exhausted or is shown to be absent in downstream stages.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: promote safe non-core labeled rows into persona-core to close the 80.0 coverage gap
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Sampled recovery candidates were mostly technical, support, or source noise, with zero safe recover_to_persona_core cases in review.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a manually curated allowlist from strong supporting sources is identified with demonstrated precision.

path_exhaustion_table.objective: use existing healthy sources to improve balance without opening a new family
path_exhaustion_table.why_failed_or_insufficient: Strict dedupe showed almost no genuinely new rows: HubSpot fetched 303 with 302 duplicates and Reddit fetched 0.
path_exhaustion_table.retry_condition: Only if a clearly new seed/window for one source is demonstrated before crawling.

blocker_table.why: No safe recovery path exists and bounded expansions produced negligible new core evidence.
The only plausible bounded existing-source expansion failed after strict dedupe.
Adobe and Google remediation found no safe fix, and weak-source deletion regressed balance.
Safe removal or remediation paths are exhausted for the currently identified weak sources.
Example-level cleanup may still be possible, but it does not materially move deck-ready readiness.
Concentration is not the main blocker; core coverage and source balance are.

freeze_recommendation.why: All safe bounded remediation and expansion paths have either failed, regressed a blocker, or produced negligible metric movement. Further micro-pilots are not justified without a genuinely new source family or dataset.

required_outcomes: add approximately 695 new safe persona-core rows without threshold relaxation
raise effective_balanced_source_count above 6.0 with genuinely new evidence
avoid increasing source concentration or weak-source debt
preserve persona_04 semantics and keep persona_05 blocked or future-subtheme-only unless independently justified
future_requirements_if_reopened.why_micro_pilots_are_not_recommended: Recent bounded pilots and recovery audits consistently showed either access failure, high duplicate rates, low labelable yield, or technical/support noise dominance.

body: The workbook currently supports 3 final-usable and production-ready personas.
It also preserves 1 review-ready and deck-ready-claim-eligible persona that should remain constrained until workbook-level blockers clear.
One future subtheme or blocked candidate is preserved for later work, but the corpus is not yet a full deck-ready or production-ready corpus.
Use this release for analyst review, evidence inspection, and scoped narrative claims only; do not present it as a final deck-ready persona corpus.

risks: Freezing now may leave some real but currently inaccessible representative evidence uncaptured.
A future high-quality source family could still change the decision, but no such path is currently validated.
Policy relaxation could make the workbook look deck-ready numerically while weakening methodological integrity.
assumptions: The audited safe bounded paths are representative of the currently available remediation surface.
Current thresholds and semantics remain fixed, as requested.
Strict deduplication and noise controls are necessary to avoid fake readiness gains.
